```py
DEFINE
 VAR MyDate = DATE(2025, 1, 25)

EVALUATE
 DATEADD(
  TREATAS({MyDate}
   ,'Date'[Date]
   )
  ,-2
  ,MONTH)
```

```py
DEFINE
    VAR MyDate = DATE(2025, 1, 25)

EVALUATE
    CALCULATETABLE(
                DATEADD('Date'[Date]
                        ,-2
                        ,MONTH)
                ,'Date'[Date] = MyDate
                )
```

```py
DEFINE
    VAR MyDate = DATE(2025, 1, 25)

    VAR Result =
        CALCULATE(DATEADD('Date'[Date]
                        ,-2
                        ,MONTH)
                ,'Date'[Date] = MyDate
                )

EVALUATE
    { Result }
```

```py
DEFINE
    VAR MyDate = DATE(2025, 1, 25)

    VAR TargetDate =
                DATEADD(
                        TREATAS({MyDate}
                            ,'Date'[Date]
                            )
                        ,-2
                        ,MONTH)

EVALUATE
{
    CALCULATE([Sum Online Sales]
            ,TargetDate
            )
            }
```

```py
DEFINE
    VAR MyDate = DATE(2025, 1, 25)

    VAR TargetDate =
                CALCULATE(DATEADD('Date'[Date]
                        ,-2
                        ,MONTH)
                ,'Date'[Date] = MyDate
                )

EVALUATE
{
    CALCULATE([Sum Online Sales]
            ,'Date'[Date] = TargetDate
            )
            }
```

```py
DEFINE
    VAR MyDate = DATE(2025, 1, 25)

    VAR DayOfWeek = CALCULATE(MIN('Date'[DayOfWeek])
                                ,'Date'[Date] = MyDate
                                )

    VAR WeekIndex = CALCULATE(MIN('Date'[WeekIndex])
                                ,'Date'[Date] = MyDate)

EVALUATE
    { CALCULATE(MIN('Date'[Date])
                ,REMOVEFILTERS('Date')
                ,'Date'[DayOfWeek] = DayOfWeek
                ,'Date'[WeekIndex] = WeekIndex - 3
                )
        }
```
